yoruba.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Mo dìmọ́ — Fi àwọn ìbéèrè ṣíṣí hàn
yoruba.open_questions_no_answer_key: Àwọn ìbéèrè ṣíṣí (kò sí kọ́kọ́rọ́ ìdáhùn)
yoruba.build_replicate_transcribe_translate_m: Kọ́ • Ṣàdàkọ • Kọ sílẹ̀ • Túmọ̀ • Yí padà • CRISPR • Sáyẹ́nsì ẹjọ́
yoruba.build_the_double_helix_from_4_letters: Kọ́ double helix láti inú lẹ́tà mẹ́rin
yoruba.a_pairs_with_t_2_bonds_g_with_c_3_wats: A ṣe àjọpọ̀ pẹ̀lú T (bond 2), G pẹ̀lú C (3). Watson + Crick + Franklin (1953) yanjú ìrísí yìí láti X-ray crystallography. Ìrísí yẹn fi bí DNA ṣe ń ṣàdàkọ ara rẹ̀ àti bí a ṣe ń kà á hàn.
yoruba.helicase_splits_the_strands_dna_polyme: Helicase ń pín strand; DNA polymerase ń kọ́ strand ìbámu. Semi-conservative — helix tuntun kọ̀ọ̀kan ní strand àtijọ́ kan + tuntun kan. Meselson àti Stahl fi hàn ní 1958.
yoruba.rna_polymerase_reads_one_dna_strand_3_: RNA polymerase ń ka DNA strand kan 3′→5′ ó sì ń kọ́ RNA 5′→3′. Àwọn lẹ́tà jọra, T nìkan ló ń di U. mRNA ń gbé ìlànà lọ sí ribosome — ìgbésẹ̀ àkọ́kọ́ ti central dogma.
yoruba.64_codons_20_amino_acids_the_genetic_c: codon 64 → amino acid 20 (genetic code pọ̀ jù). AUG ń bẹ̀rẹ̀; UAA/UAG/UGA ń dá dúró. tRNA ń ka codon, ń mú amino acid tí ó tọ́ wá, ń kọ́ peptide bond.
yoruba.point_mutation_one_letter_swapped_inse: Point mutation — a yí lẹ́tà kan padà. Insertion/deletion — reading frame ń yí, gbogbo protein tí ó wà ní ìsàlẹ̀ ba jẹ́. Sickle cell anemia jẹ́ A→T kan ṣoṣo — lẹ́tà kan, ipa ìgbésí ayé gbogbo.
yoruba.bacterial_immune_system_repurposed_cas: A tún lo ètò àjẹsára ti bakitéríà. Cas9 enzyme + guide RNA = ọ̀bẹ molecule. Doudna + Charpentier gba Nobel 2020. CRISPR therapy àkọ́kọ́ (sickle cell) ni FDA fọwọ́ sí ní Disẹ́mbà 2023.
yoruba.sequence_determines_structure_determin: Sequence ń pinnu ìtòlẹ́sẹẹsẹ tí ó ń pinnu iṣẹ́. Hemoglobin ń gbé O₂, antibody ń dá mọ̀, enzyme ń catalyze. AlphaFold (2020) sọ àsọtẹ́lẹ̀ ìtòlẹ́sẹẹsẹ mílíọ̀nù 200 — ìṣòro ọdún 50 ni a yanjú ní oṣù 18.
yoruba.forensics_str_profiling_dna_evidence: Sáyẹ́nsì ẹjọ́ — STR profiling + ẹ̀rí DNA
yoruba.codis_uses_20_short_tandem_repeat_str_: CODIS ń lo short tandem repeat (STR) loci 20. Ìṣeéṣe ìbámu jẹ́ ọ̀kan nínú quadrillion nígbà tí gbogbo loci bá bámu. Innocence Project — ẹjọ́ tí ó ju 245 tí ó ṣàṣìṣe ni a fagi lé nípasẹ̀ àyẹ̀wò DNA lẹ́yìn ẹ̀bi.
yoruba.challenge_graded_problems: Ìpèníjà — àwọn ìṣòro tí a gba àmì
yoruba.practice_transcription_translation_mut: Ṣe àṣà transcription, translation, ìpín mutation. AP Bio Big Idea 3.A.1 — DNA (nígbà mìíràn RNA) ni ìpìlẹ̀ ìfìdánilọ́wọ́ ìsọfúnni àbùdá. NGSS HS-LS3-1.
yoruba.retrieval_practice_gamified_speed_buil: Àṣà ìgbàpadà — ní àwòṣe eré. Ìyára ń kọ́ automaticity — nígbà tí wíwo codon table bá di aládàáṣe, working memory rẹ di òmìnira fún ìrònú ìpele gíga, bíi sísọ àsọtẹ́lẹ̀ ipa mutation.
yoruba.dna_rna_protein_with_retroviruses_hiv_: DNA → RNA → protein — pẹ̀lú retrovirus (HIV) tí ń rìn sẹ́yìn nípasẹ̀ reverse transcriptase. Crick dá ọ̀rọ̀ "dogma" ní 1957; lẹ́yìn náà ó sọ pé ó túmọ̀sí àbá, kìí ṣe òtítọ́ tí a kò lè kọ̀.
yoruba.pick_a_sequence_the_complementary_stra: Yan sequence — a ń fi base pairing (A-T, G-C) kún strand ìbámu. A ń kọ́ DNA gidi bẹ́ẹ̀ nígbà gbogbo.
yoruba.helicase_unwinds_the_helix_dna_polymer: Helicase ń tú helix; DNA polymerase ń ka template strand kọ̀ọ̀kan ó sì ń gbé ìbámu rẹ̀ kalẹ̀. Semi-conservative — daughter strand kọ̀ọ̀kan ní àtijọ́ kan + tuntun kan.
yoruba.rna_polymerase_reads_the_template_stra: RNA polymerase ń ka template strand. Òfin complementarity kannáà, ṣùgbọ́n T → U. Àbájáde — ẹ̀dà mRNA single-strand kan, tí ó ṣetán láti jáde kúrò ní nucleus.
yoruba.ribosome_reads_codons_3_bases_at_a_tim: Ribosome ń ka codon (base 3 lákòókò kan). codon kọ̀ọ̀kan → amino acid kan. A ń ka genetic code gẹ́gẹ́ bí triplet tí kò ṣàṣepọ̀, tí kò ní àmì ìdánudúró.
yoruba.point_mutations_silent_no_protein_chan: Point mutation — silent (protein kò yí padà), missense (amino acid kan yàtọ̀), nonsense (dídúró ní kùtùkùtù). Frameshift (insertion/deletion) sábà máa ń ba nǹkan jẹ́.
yoruba.guide_rna_points_cas9_to_a_20_base_tar: Guide RNA ń tọ́ka Cas9 sí target 20-base. Cas9 ń gé strand méjèèjì. Repair pathway ti sẹ́ẹ̀lì ń pa gene mọ́ tàbí fi template tí o fún kún.
yoruba.primary_sequence_secondary_helix_sheet: Primary (sequence) → secondary (α-helix, β-sheet) → tertiary (kíká 3D) → quaternary (multi-subunit). Ìyípadà amino acid kan lè ba kíká jẹ́.
yoruba.str_profiling_13_20_short_tandem_repea: STR profiling — short tandem repeat loci 13-20. Ìṣeéṣe ìbámu láìtòótọ́ káàkiri gbogbo loci fẹ́rẹ̀ jẹ́ ọ̀kan nínú bílíọ̀nù. A ń lò ó ní CODIS, paternity test, àti forensic lab.
yoruba.a_new_dna_puzzle_every_session_transla: Àlọ́ DNA tuntun ní session kọ̀ọ̀kan. Túmọ̀, dá mutation mọ̀, wá ORF tàbí yanjú ẹjọ́ forensic kan. Streak counter ń tọpinpin ìṣẹ́gun ojoojúmọ́.
yoruba.speed_translation_duel_decode_codons_f: Ìdíje ìyára ìtumọ̀. Decode codon kíákíá bí o ṣe ń díje pẹ̀lú aago. Dán an wò bóyá genetic code wà nínú ọpọlọ rẹ, kìí ṣe lórí reference card nìkan.
yoruba.codon_table_base_pairing_rules_key_ter: Codon table, àwọn òfin base pairing, àwọn ọ̀rọ̀ pàtàkì (ORF, intron, exon, promoter, repressor) — cheat sheet tí o lè tún wò léraléra.
yoruba.mrna_is_a_copy_of_the_coding_strand_wi: 💡 mRNA jẹ́ ẹ̀dà ti coding strand níbi tí U ti gba ipò T. (RNA polymerase ń ka complementary template strand 3'→5', ó ń fún sequence tí ó jọ coding strand.)
yoruba.no_pam_sites_ngg_found_try_a_different: ⚠️ Kò rí PAM site (NGG) kankan. Gbìyànjú DNA sequence mìíràn láti Build tab.
yoruba.double_strand_break_created_choose_rep: ✂️ A ṣẹ̀dá double-strand break! Yan repair pathway:
yoruba.crispr_clustered_regularly_interspaced: CRISPR (Clustered Regularly Interspaced Short Palindromic Repeats) jẹ́ gene-editing technology tí ó wá láti inú ààbò àjẹsára ti bakitéríà.
yoruba.a_20nt_rna_that_directs_cas9_to_the_ta: — RNA ~20nt tí ń darí Cas9 sí target
yoruba.protospacer_adjacent_motif_ngg_require: — Protospacer Adjacent Motif (NGG). A nílò rẹ̀ fún binding.
yoruba.gene_therapy_sickle_cell_casgevy_cance: Gene therapy (sickle cell → CASGEVY™), cancer immunotherapy, ẹ̀rọ ọ̀gbìn, àwòṣe àrùn.
yoruba.ala_val_leu_ile_pro_phe_trp_met_gly: Ala, Val, Leu, Ile, Pro, Phe, Trp, Met, Gly
yoruba.ser_thr_cys_tyr_asn_gln: Ser, Thr, Cys, Tyr, Asn, Gln
yoruba.run_transcription_and_translation_firs: Ṣe Transcription àti Translation ní àkọ́kọ́!
yoruba.predict_the_effect_type_from_5_options: Sọ àsọtẹ́lẹ̀ irú ipa láti inú àṣàyàn 5.
yoruba.10_mutation_vignettes_each_shows_a_sho: Mutation vignette 10. Ọ̀kọ̀ọ̀kan ń fi DNA sequence kúkúrú hàn ṣáájú/lẹ́yìn tí ó ń tẹnu mọ́ ìyípadà. Yan irú ipa — silent, missense, nonsense, frameshift, tàbí in-frame indel. Lẹ́yìn yíyàn, coaching ń ṣàlàyé ìdí tí ipa yìí fi ṣeéṣe jù àwọn mìíràn.
yoruba.polar_hydroxyl_side_chain_often_phosph: Polar, hydroxyl side chain. Sábà phosphorylated.
yoruba.forms_disulfide_bonds_s_s_critical_for: Ń kọ́ disulfide bond (S-S). Pàtàkì fún protein folding.
yoruba.aromatic_hydrophobic_largest_amino_aci: Aromatic, hydrophobic. amino acid tí ó tóbi jù.
yoruba.rigid_ring_disrupts_helices: Ring líle. Ń ba α-helix jẹ́.
yoruba.basic_side_chain_active_site_of_many_e: Basic side chain. active site ti ọ̀pọ̀ enzyme (pKa ~7).
yoruba.polar_amide_common_n_glycosylation_sit: Polar amide. N-glycosylation site tí ó wọ́pọ̀.
yoruba.basic_long_side_chain_often_acetylated: Basic, long side chain. Sábà acetylated/methylated.
yoruba.basic_guanidinium_group_6_codons_most_: Basic, guanidinium group. codon 6 — degenerate jù.
yoruba.acidic_most_abundant_in_proteins: Acidic. Ó pọ̀ jù nínú protein.
yoruba.smallest_no_side_chain_high_flexibilit: Ó kéré jù. Kò sí side chain — flexibility gíga.
yoruba.helicase_unwinds_the_double_helix_at_o: Helicase ń tú double helix ní replication origin. Single-strand binding protein ń dí re-annealing lọ́wọ́. Topoisomerase ń dín supercoil tension kù níwájú fork.
yoruba.primase_lays_down_short_10_nt_rna_prim: Primase ń gbé RNA primer kúkúrú (~10 nt) kalẹ̀ — DNA polymerase nílò 3'-OH láti extend, nítorí náà kò lè bẹ̀rẹ̀ strand tuntun fúnra rẹ̀.
yoruba.synthesized_continuously_5_3_in_the_sa: A ń ṣe synthesize láìdáwọ́dúró 5'→3' ní ọ̀nà kannáà tí replication fork ń rìn. primer kan fún origin kọ̀ọ̀kan.
yoruba.synthesized_in_short_100_1000_nt_fragm: A ń ṣe synthesize gẹ́gẹ́ bí fragment kúkúrú 100-1000 nt (Okazaki fragment) nítorí polymerase lè extend 5'→3' nìkan. Fragment kọ̀ọ̀kan nílò primer tirẹ̀.
yoruba.rna_primers_are_excised_and_replaced_w: A ń gé RNA primer, a sì ń fi DNA nucleotide rọ́pò wọn.
yoruba.joins_okazaki_fragments_by_forming_the: Ń so Okazaki fragment pọ̀ nípa kíkọ́ phosphodiester bond ìkẹyìn.
yoruba.polymerase_checks_each_base_mismatches: Polymerase ń ṣàyẹ̀wò base kọ̀ọ̀kan; a ń yọ mismatch kúrò a sì ń rọ́pò wọn. Ń dín error rate kù láti ~10⁻⁵ sí ~10⁻⁷.
yoruba.catches_the_few_mismatches_that_escape: Ń mú mismatch díẹ̀ tí ó sá fún proofreading. error rate ìkẹyìn — ~10⁻¹⁰ fún base pair kọ̀ọ̀kan.
yoruba.rna_polymerase_binds_the_promoter_e_g_: RNA polymerase ń so mọ́ promoter (bíi TATA box ~25 bp upstream ti transcription start). Ń ràn án lọ́wọ́ láti melt DNA double helix.
yoruba.polymerase_reads_template_strand_3_5_s: Polymerase ń ka template strand 3'→5' ó sì ń ṣe synthesize mRNA 5'→3'. Nínú bakitéríà ó ń fi ~nucleotide 30 kún ní ìṣẹ́jú-àáyá kan; ~10-50 nínú eukaryote.
yoruba.bacteria_rho_dependent_or_intrinsic_te: Bakitéríà — rho-dependent tàbí intrinsic termination (hairpin loop). Eukaryote — cleavage àti polyadenylation signal.
yoruba.7_methylguanosine_cap_added_to_5_end_h: A ń fi 7-methylguanosine cap kún 5' end. Ń ran ribosome lọ́wọ́ láti dá mRNA mọ̀ + dáàbò bo lọ́wọ́ degradation.
yoruba.introns_removed_exons_joined_by_the_sp: A ń yọ intron, spliceosome ń so exon pọ̀. Alternative splicing → ọ̀pọ̀ protein láti gene kan.
yoruba.100_250_adenine_nucleotides_added_to_3: A ń fi adenine nucleotide ~100-250 kún 3' end. Ń mú kí mRNA dúró gbọ̀ngbọ̀n + ń ṣàmì export rẹ̀.
yoruba.mature_mrna_exits_through_nuclear_pore: mRNA tí ó dàgbà ń jáde nípasẹ̀ nuclear pore sí cytoplasm.
yoruba.small_ribosomal_subunit_binds_mrna_ini: Small ribosomal subunit ń so mọ́ mRNA. Initiator tRNA (tí ń gbé Met) ń so mọ́ start codon AUG. Large subunit ń darapọ̀.
yoruba.each_cycle_aminoacyl_trna_enters_a_sit: Ìyípo kọ̀ọ̀kan — aminoacyl-tRNA ń wọ A site → a ń kọ́ peptide bond (23S rRNA ní catalyze, ribozyme) → ribosome ń rìn codon kan → tRNA ń lọ A→P→E.
yoruba.stop_codon_uaa_uag_uga_recognized_by_r: Stop codon (UAA/UAG/UGA) ni release factor dá mọ̀. A ń tú peptide sílẹ̀, ribosome ń pínyà.
yoruba.chaperones_hsp70_groel_help_proteins_f: Chaperone (Hsp70, GroEL) ń ran protein lọ́wọ́ láti káká dáradára. Post-translational modification — phosphorylation, glycosylation, cleavage, disulfide bond.
yoruba.codon_changes_but_amino_acid_is_the_sa: Codon yí padà, ṣùgbọ́n amino acid jẹ́ kannáà (genetic code redundancy). Kò sí ipa.
yoruba.codon_changes_different_amino_acid_eff: Codon yí padà → amino acid yàtọ̀. Ipa láti kò sí (conservative substitution) sí líle (sickle cell — Glu→Val).
yoruba.codon_changes_stop_codon_truncated_pro: Codon yí padà → STOP codon. A ń gé protein kúrú, sábà non-functional.
yoruba.adds_nucleotide_s_if_not_a_multiple_of: Ń fi nucleotide kún. Bí kò bá jẹ́ ìlọ́po 3, reading frame ń yí → gbogbo codon ní ìsàlẹ̀ ń yí padà. Sábà líle.
yoruba.removes_nucleotide_s_same_frameshift_c: Ń yọ nucleotide kúrò. Àbájáde frameshift kannáà bíi insertion.
yoruba.extra_copies_of_a_gene_or_region_can_l: Àwọn ẹ̀dà àfikún ti gene tàbí agbègbè. Ó lè mú dosage effect wá (Down syndrome = chromosome 21 àfikún).
yoruba.segment_of_chromosome_flipped_may_disr: A yí apá chromosome padà. Ó lè ba gene jẹ́ ní breakpoint.
yoruba.segment_moves_to_a_different_chromosom: Apá ń lọ sí chromosome mìíràn. Olókìkí — Philadelphia chromosome (CML; BCR-ABL fusion).
yoruba.repeating_unit_e_g_cag_expands_across_: Ẹ̀ka tí ń tún ṣe (bíi CAG) ń gbòòrò káàkiri ìran. Huntington (CAG nínú HTT), fragile X (CGG nínú FMR1), myotonic dystrophy.
yoruba.pairs_1_22_numbered_roughly_by_size_wi: Ìsopọ̀ 1-22 (a kà á ní ìsúnmọ́ nípa ìwọ̀n, pẹ̀lú àyàfi — chr. 21 kéré ju chr. 22).
yoruba.xx_female_or_xy_male_y_is_much_smaller: XX (obìnrin) tàbí XY (ọkùnrin). Y kéré gan-an, ó ń gbé gene díẹ̀ (~70) ní ìfiwéra pẹ̀lú X (~800).
yoruba.23_pairs_diploid_in_somatic_cells_game: Ìsopọ̀ 23 (diploid nínú somatic cell). Gamete jẹ́ haploid (chromosome 23, kò sí ìsopọ̀).
yoruba.surprisingly_few_many_genes_produce_mu: Díẹ̀ lọ́nà ìyanu — ọ̀pọ̀ gene ń ṣe agbo protein nípasẹ̀ alternative splicing. Ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ genome jẹ́ regulatory tàbí non-coding.
yoruba.if_stretched_out_1_8_m_of_dna_per_cell: Bí a bá nà á jáde, ~1.8 m ti DNA fún sẹ́ẹ̀lì kọ̀ọ̀kan. A ń kó o sínú nucleus ti ~10 µm nípasẹ̀ histone + supercoiling.
yoruba.maternally_inherited_codes_for_37_gene: A jogún láti ọ̀dọ̀ ìyá. Ń ṣe code gene 37 (protein 13, tRNA 22, rRNA 2). Ọ̀pọ̀ ẹ̀dà fún mitochondrion kọ̀ọ̀kan.
yoruba.amplifies_a_specific_dna_segment_by_2_: Ń ṣe àmúpọ̀ apá DNA pàtó nípasẹ̀ 2ⁿ (ìyípo n). Ń lo Taq polymerase tí ó fara da ooru. Ìpìlẹ̀ molecular biology òde òní.
yoruba.reads_dna_sequence_using_chain_termina: Ń ka DNA sequence nípasẹ̀ lílo chain-terminating dideoxynucleotide. Read length ~800-1000 bp. Nísisìyí sábà a fi next-generation sequencing rọ́pò rẹ̀.
yoruba.massively_parallel_sequences_millions_: Massively parallel — ń ṣe sequence mílíọ̀nù fragment lákòókò kan. Illumina ń jọba. Read length ~100-300 bp, bílíọ̀nù fún run kọ̀ọ̀kan.
yoruba.programmable_gene_editing_guide_rna_ta: Programmable gene editing. Guide RNA ń darí nuclease Cas9 sí DNA pàtó. Cut ń ṣe gene knockout tàbí HDR-mediated insertion. Nobel 2020.
yoruba.edits_a_single_base_without_double_str: Ń ṣàtúnṣe base kan láìsí double-strand break. off-target effect díẹ̀ ju Cas9.
yoruba.bacterial_proteins_that_cut_dna_at_spe: Protein bakitéríà tí ń gé DNA ní sequence pàtó 4-8 bp. Wọ́n mú kí recombinant DNA technology ṣeéṣe. Nobel 1978.
yoruba.joins_dna_fragments_via_phosphodiester: Ń so DNA fragment pọ̀ nípasẹ̀ phosphodiester bond. T4 DNA ligase jẹ́ cloning workhorse.
yoruba.separates_dna_fragments_by_size_in_an_: Ń ya DNA fragment sọ́tọ̀ nípa ìwọ̀n nínú electric field. fragment kékeré ń rìn kíákíá nínú gel matrix.
yoruba.thousands_of_dna_probes_on_a_chip_meas: Ẹgbẹẹgbẹ̀rún DNA probe lórí chip. Ń díwọ̀n gene expression tàbí detect SNP ní parallel.
yoruba.sequences_mrna_from_individual_cells_r: Ń ṣe sequence mRNA láti sẹ́ẹ̀lì kọ̀ọ̀kan. Ń ṣàfihàn cell-type heterogeneity tí bulk RNA-seq ń pàdánù.
yoruba.near_atomic_structures_of_rna_dna_comp: Ìtòlẹ́sẹẹsẹ near-atomic ti RNA/DNA complex láìsí crystallization. Alágbára fún ribosome, spliceosome, replisome.
yoruba.read_lengths_up_to_100kb_vs_illumina_s: Read length títí dé 100 kb+ (dídojúkọ ~300 bp ti Illumina). Dára jù fún structural variant, repeat, full-length transcript.
yoruba.differential_reproduction_based_on_her: Ìbísí oríṣiríṣi tí ó dá lórí variation tí a lè jogún. Gene tí ń mú survival/reproduction sunwọ̀n ń di wọ́pọ̀ jù káàkiri ìran.
yoruba.random_source_of_new_genetic_variation: Orísun àìtòótọ́ ti genetic variation tuntun. Sábà neutral tàbí ìpalára; ṣọ̀wọ́n ni ó ṣàǹfààní. substrate ti selection.
yoruba.random_changes_in_allele_frequency_esp: Àwọn ìyípadà àìtòótọ́ nínú allele frequency, pàápàá nínú population kékeré. Founder effect + bottleneck jẹ́ àpẹẹrẹ tí ó pọ̀jù.
yoruba.movement_of_alleles_between_population: Ìṣíkiri allele láàrin population nípasẹ̀ migration. Ń dín ìyàtọ̀ láàrin population kù; ń mú diversity pọ̀ sí i nínú population.
yoruba.formation_of_new_species_usually_via_r: Ìṣẹ̀dá species tuntun, sábà nípasẹ̀ reproductive isolation. Allopatric (ìpínyà ilẹ̀-ayé) jẹ́ èyí tí ó wọ́pọ̀ jù.
yoruba.unrelated_organisms_evolve_similar_tra: Àwọn ẹ̀dá tí kò ní ìbátan ń evolve àwọn ànímọ́ tí ó jọra lọ́nà òmìnira (ìyẹ́ nínú ẹyẹ, àdán, kòkòrò; ojú nínú vertebrate + cephalopod).
yoruba.all_life_shares_a_common_ancestor_luca: Gbogbo ìwàláàyè ń pín baba-ńlá kannáà (LUCA). Ẹ̀rí — genetic code, ribosome, ATP, glycolysis, biochemistry ìpìlẹ̀ tí a pín.
yoruba.diagram_showing_evolutionary_relations: Àwòrán tí ń fi àjọṣepọ̀ evolution hàn. A ń kọ́ ọ jù láti ìfiwéra DNA sequence dípò morphology.
yoruba.allele_frequencies_stay_constant_under: allele frequency dúró ṣinṣin lábẹ́ àwọn àbá no-evolution — population ńlá, random mating, kò sí selection/mutation/migration/drift. p² + 2pq + q² = 1.
yoruba.interactive_references_pick_a_topic_be: Àwọn ìtọ́kasí ìbáṣepọ̀ — yan kókó-ọ̀rọ̀ ní ìsàlẹ̀ láti ṣàwárí.
yoruba.five_nitrogenous_bases_make_up_dna_rna: nitrogenous base márùn-ún ń ṣe DNA + RNA — A, T, G, C (DNA); A, U, G, C (RNA). Purine (A, G) ní ring 2; pyrimidine (T, U, C) ní 1. Pairing gẹ́gẹ́ bí H-bond pattern pàtó.
yoruba.64_codons_4_encode_20_amino_acids_3_st: codon 64 (4³) ń ṣe code amino acid 20 + stop signal 3. Code pọ̀ jù (degenerate) — ọ̀pọ̀ amino acid ní codon púpọ̀, sábà yàtọ̀ ní ipò kẹta ("wobble"). Universal ní fẹ́rẹ̀ gbogbo ìwàláàyè.
yoruba.third_codon_position_pairs_less_strict: Ipò codon kẹta ń ṣe àjọpọ̀ pẹ̀lú líle díẹ̀ — tRNA kan lè dá codon púpọ̀ mọ̀. Ń dín iye tRNA tí a nílò kù (cell ní ~30-40, kìí ṣe 64).
yoruba.semi_conservative_each_new_helix_has_o: Semi-conservative — helix tuntun kọ̀ọ̀kan ní parental kan + newly-synthesized strand kan. Meselson-Stahl fi hàn ní 1958. ~50 bp/ìṣẹ́jú-àáyá nínú bakitéríà; ~50 bp/ìṣẹ́jú-àáyá fún fork nínú eukaryote (ṣùgbọ́n ẹgbẹẹgbẹ̀rún fork parallel).
yoruba.rna_polymerase_reads_dna_template_3_5_: RNA polymerase ń ka DNA template (3'→5') ó sì ń ṣe synthesize mRNA (5'→3'). Nínú eukaryote, a ń ṣe primary transcript gan-an ṣáájú export.
yoruba.ribosome_reads_mrna_in_3_base_codons_a: Ribosome ń ka mRNA gẹ́gẹ́ bí 3-base codon ó sì ń kọ́ protein. ~10-20 amino acid/ìṣẹ́jú-àáyá nínú bakitéríà; ~3-5 nínú eukaryote. Ọ̀pọ̀ ribosome lè translate mRNA kannáà (polyribosome).
yoruba.mutations_range_from_invisible_silent_: Mutation wà láti àìríran (silent) sí apani. Ipa wọn dá lórí ohun tí ó yí padà, ibo, àti nínú cell type wo.
yoruba.disease_causing_genes_examples: 🏥 Àwọn gene tí ń fa àrùn (àpẹẹrẹ)
yoruba.a_sampling_of_well_characterized_genet: Àpẹẹrẹ àwọn àìsàn àbùdá tí a ṣàpèjúwe dáradára. Àwọn ohun èlò genetic counseling àti therapy òde-òní ń dàgbà — fún àwọn ìpinnu clinical wo àwọn ìwé òde-òní.
yoruba.family_a_three_generations_blue_eyes: Ìdílé A — ìran mẹ́ta, ojú búlúù
yoruba.two_unaffected_parents_gen_i_have_one_: Òbí méjì tí kò ní àbùkù (gen. I) ní ọmọ kan tí ó ní àbùkù + kan tí kò ní àbùkù (gen. II). Ọmọ tí ó ní àbùkù + alábàáṣepọ̀ tí kò ní àbùkù ní kan tí ó ní àbùkù + kan tí kò ní àbùkù (gen. III). Ànímọ́ hàn ní ìsúnmọ́ 25% ti àwọn ọmọ láti cross ti àwọn tí kò ní àbùkù.
yoruba.trait_skips_generations_unaffected_par: Ànímọ́ ń fo ìran (òbí tí kò ní àbùkù → ọmọ tí ó ní àbùkù).
yoruba.parents_must_be_heterozygous_carriers_: Àwọn òbí gbọ́dọ̀ jẹ́ heterozygous carrier tí ọ̀kọ̀ọ̀kan ń fún ní recessive allele kan.
yoruba.affected_individuals_appear_in_both_se: Àwọn ẹnìkọ̀ọ̀kan tí ó ní àbùkù hàn nínú akọ àti abo pẹ̀lú frequency tí ó fẹ́rẹ̀ dọ́gba.
yoruba.affected_aa_homozygous_carriers_aa_are: Tí ó ní àbùkù = aa homozygous; carrier (Aa) jẹ́ phenotypically tí kò ní àbùkù.
yoruba.family_b_color_blindness_across_three_: Ìdílé B — ìfọ́jú àwọ̀ káàkiri ìran mẹ́ta
yoruba.affected_grandfather_gen_i_has_unaffec: Bàbá àgbà tí ó ní àbùkù (gen. I) ní ọmọbìnrin tí kò ní àbùkù (gen. II) àti ọmọ-ọmọ tí ó ní àbùkù nípasẹ̀ ọmọbìnrin yẹn (gen. III). Kò sí ọmọkùnrin tí ó ní àbùkù láti ọ̀dọ̀ bàbá tí kò ní àbùkù. Ànímọ́ hàn jù nínú àwọn ọkùnrin.
yoruba.trait_shows_strong_male_bias_hemizygou: Ànímọ́ fi male bias tí ó lágbára hàn (hemizygous ọkùnrin ń ṣàfihàn rẹ̀; obìnrin nílò ẹ̀dà 2).
yoruba.unaffected_daughter_of_affected_grandf: Ọmọbìnrin tí kò ní àbùkù ti bàbá àgbà tí ó ní àbùkù jẹ́ carrier dandan.
yoruba.trait_skips_generation_through_carrier: Ànímọ́ ń fo ìran nípasẹ̀ ọmọbìnrin carrier, lẹ́yìn náà ó tún hàn nínú ọmọ-ọmọ.
yoruba.no_father_to_son_transmission_sons_inh: Kò sí father-to-son transmission (àwọn ọmọkùnrin jogún Y láti ọ̀dọ̀ bàbá, kìí ṣe X).
yoruba.family_c_huntington_like_late_onset_tr: Ìdílé C — ànímọ́ tí ń bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ́ bíi Huntington
yoruba.every_affected_individual_has_at_least: Gbogbo ẹni tí ó ní àbùkù ní ó kéré tán òbí kan tí ó ní àbùkù. Ànímọ́ hàn ní ìran kọ̀ọ̀kan. ~50% ti àwọn ọmọ láti òbí tí ó ní àbùkù ní àbùkù. Dọ́gba nínú akọ + abo.
yoruba.trait_appears_in_every_generation_no_s: Ànímọ́ hàn ní ìran kọ̀ọ̀kan (kì í fo).
yoruba.every_affected_individual_has_at_least_2: Gbogbo ẹni tí ó ní àbùkù ní ó kéré tán òbí kan tí ó ní àbùkù.
yoruba.roughly_50_of_children_of_an_affected_: ~50% ti àwọn ọmọ ti heterozygote tí ó ní àbùkù ní àbùkù.
yoruba.equal_frequency_in_males_females_autos: frequency tí ó dọ́gba nínú akọ + abo — autosomal, kìí ṣe sex-linked.
yoruba.inheritance_pattern_reasoning_ranking_: Inheritance pattern + reasoning ranking — a gbọ́dọ̀ jẹ́rìí sí méjèèjì ṣáájú reveal. Reveal ń fún ranking rẹ ní àmì ní ìgbésẹ̀-ìgbésẹ̀, kìí ṣe ìdáhùn ìkẹyìn rẹ nìkan. Ìwádìí gidi ń béèrè kí o mọ ìdí, kìí ṣe kìn nìkan.
yoruba.2_rank_these_explanations_most_least_s: 2. Ṣe àtòjọ àwọn àlàyé wọ̀nyí (jù → kéré ìtìlẹ́yìn):
yoruba.notice_the_ranking_grade_is_independen: Ṣàkíyèsí — ranking grade jẹ́ òmìnira láti pattern grade — o lè mọ ohun tí ó tọ́ ṣùgbọ́n gbé ìdí sí ètò tí kò tọ́.
yoruba.during_gamete_formation_the_two_allele: Nígbà ìṣẹ̀dá gamete, allele méjì ti gene kọ̀ọ̀kan ń pínyà, kí gamete kọ̀ọ̀kan lè gbé allele kan.
yoruba.alleles_for_different_genes_assort_ind: allele fún gene ọ̀tọ̀ọ̀tọ̀ ń ṣe assort lọ́nà òmìnira sí ara wọn nígbà ìṣẹ̀dá gamete (gene lórí chromosome ọ̀tọ̀ọ̀tọ̀).
yoruba.when_two_different_alleles_are_present: Nígbà tí allele méjì ọ̀tọ̀ọ̀tọ̀ bá wà, ọ̀kan (dominant) ń ṣàfihàn nígbà tí èkejì (recessive) ń bò.
yoruba.methyl_group_ch_added_to_cytosines_esp: A ń fi methyl group (–CH₃) kún cytosine, pàápàá ní CpG island. Sábà ń mú kí gene expression dákẹ́.
yoruba.acetylation_methylation_phosphorylatio: Acetylation, methylation, phosphorylation ti histone tail. Ń yí chromatin packaging padà.
yoruba.atp_dependent_complexes_slide_or_eject: ATP-dependent complex ń rọ́ tàbí ń jáde nucleosome láti ṣàfihàn DNA.
yoruba.mirna_lncrna_regulate_gene_expression_: miRNA, lncRNA ń ṣàkóso gene expression ní post-transcriptionally.
yoruba.some_genes_expressed_only_from_materna: Àwọn gene kan ń ṣàfihàn láti maternal tàbí paternal allele nìkan. Methylation mark.
yoruba.some_epigenetic_marks_survive_gametoge: Àwọn epigenetic mark kan ń wà láàyè láti gametogenesis wọ́n sì ń kọjá sí offspring.
yoruba.who_can_access_your_genome_gina_2008_u: Ta ni ó lè wọlé sí genome rẹ? GINA (2008, US) ń fòfin de genetic discrimination nínú iṣẹ́ + health insurance, ṣùgbọ́n kìí ṣe nínú life insurance.
yoruba.23andme_ancestrydna_reveal_ancestry_he: 23andMe, AncestryDNA ń ṣàfihàn ancestry + health risk. Àníyàn — incidental finding, ìpéye, pínpín data pẹ̀lú third party.
yoruba.in_2018_he_jiankui_edited_embryos_for_: Ní 2018 He Jiankui ṣàtúnṣe embryo fún HIV resistance → a bí ìbejì. A dá a lẹ́bi kárí ayé. Ọ̀pọ̀ orílẹ̀-èdè ń fòfin de germline editing.
yoruba.hypothetical_selection_or_editing_of_e: Yíyàn tàbí àtúnṣe àròsọ ti embryo fún àwọn ànímọ́ tí kìí ṣe ìṣègùn (gíga, IQ). Nísisìyí ó ní ààlà ní ẹ̀rọ; àríyànjiyàn nínú ìwà-ọmọlúàbí.
yoruba.engineered_to_spread_through_wild_popu: A ṣe ẹ̀rọ láti tàn nípasẹ̀ wild population (bíi malaria resistance nínú ẹ̀fọn). Ecological àìlèyípadà lè ṣẹlẹ̀.
yoruba.should_we_test_for_untreatable_disease: Ṣé ó yẹ ká test fún àwọn àrùn tí a kò lè wò sàn (Huntington)? Àwọn kan ń yan láti má mọ̀.
yoruba.familial_dna_searches_solved_cold_case: Familial DNA search yanjú cold case (Golden State Killer, 2018) ṣùgbọ́n ń gbé àwọn ìbéèrè dìde nípa privacy ti àwọn ìbátan tí kò gbà.
yoruba.us_supreme_court_2013_ruled_that_natur: US Supreme Court (2013) dájọ́ pé DNA àdánidá kò lè jẹ́ patent, ṣùgbọ́n synthetic cDNA lè.
yoruba.reference_genomes_historically_eurocen: Reference genome ní ìtàn jẹ́ Eurocentric. Àwọn ìsapá láti mú reference diversity sunwọ̀n ń tẹ̀síwájú (bíi human pangenome project).
yoruba.genome_size_does_not_correlate_with_or: Ìwọ̀n genome kò bá ìdíjú ti organism mu (C-value paradox). Ènìyàn ní gene count bíi roundworm — ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ DNA "àfikún" nínú genome ńlá jẹ́ non-coding.
yoruba.heritable_changes_in_gene_expression_t: Àwọn ìyípadà tí a lè jogún nínú gene expression láìsí ìyípadà DNA sequence. Àyíká, oúnjẹ, ìdààmú ni ó ń nípa lórí.
yoruba.building_blocks_of_proteins_9_are_esse: Àwọn bíríkì ìkọ́ ti protein. 9 jẹ́ "essential" (a kò lè ṣe synthesize — a gbọ́dọ̀ rí i láti oúnjẹ) — His, Ile, Leu, Lys, Met, Phe, Thr, Trp, Val.
yoruba.essentially_no_beneficial_fixation_exp: Ní pàtàkì kò sí beneficial fixation tí a ń retí. Population wà nínú mutation-selection balance tàbí drift nìkan.
yoruba.drift_dominates_few_expected_fixations: Drift ń jọba — fixation díẹ̀ tí a ń retí, bó tilẹ̀ jẹ́ pé mutation ń ṣẹlẹ̀. Wọ́pọ̀ nínú population kékeré.
yoruba.a_handful_of_beneficial_mutations_expe: A ń retí beneficial mutation díẹ̀ láti jẹ́ fixed. Ọ̀pá-ìdiwọ̀n fún ọ̀pọ̀ population àdánidá.
yoruba.many_fixations_expected_strong_selecti: A ń retí fixation púpọ̀ — strong selection, population ńlá, tàbí méjèèjì. Bíi antibiotic resistance ti bakitéríà.
yoruba.extreme_regime_viruses_cancer_cell_lin: Regime tí ó pọ̀jù — virus, cancer cell line, asexual lab population. Ọ̀pọ̀ adaptive sweep lákòókò kan.
yoruba.set_per_base_mutation_rate_population_: Ṣètò per-base mutation rate, population size, generation, àti selection coefficient. Sọ àsọtẹ́lẹ̀ iye beneficial mutation tí ó jẹ́ fixed ní tòótọ́. Kò sí score, kò sí reveal.
yoruba.log_n_vs_log_circles_typical_regimes: log₁₀(N) vs. log₁₀(μ) — àyíká = regime tí ó wọ́pọ̀
yoruba.your_hypothesis_which_slider_has_the_b: Àbá rẹ (slider wo ni ó ní ipa tí ó tóbi jù lórí fixation rate? Kí ló dé?)
yoruba.e_g_selection_has_more_leverage_than_o: bíi selection ní leverage jù μ nígbà tí N bá tóbi tó...
yoruba.when_does_the_regime_move_from_drift_d: Ìgbà wo ni regime ń rìn láti drift-dominated sí selection-dominated? Kí ni N·s ń sọ fún ọ?
yoruba.why_are_antibiotic_resistance_and_vira: Kí ló dé tí antibiotic resistance àti viral evolution fi yára gan-an — slider wo ni ó wà ní òpin rẹ̀?
yoruba.a_neutral_mutation_s_0_has_fixation_pr: neutral mutation (s = 0) ní fixation probability 1/(2N). Kí ni ìyẹn túmọ̀sí fún large population?
yoruba.could_the_same_population_size_be_drif: Ṣé population size kannáà lè jẹ́ "drift-dominated" fún weak mutation àti "selection-dominated" fún strong lákòókò kan?
yoruba.i_can_explain_why_this_n_g_s_combinati: Mo lè ṣàlàyé ìdí tí ìdàpọ̀ μ × N × g × s yìí fi ń ṣẹ̀dá regime yìí.
yoruba.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Inquiry widget — kò sí score, kò sí reveal, kò sí answer dump. Ń lo Kimura full diploid fixation formula (1962) (1−e^(−2s))/(1−e^(−4Ns)), tí ń ṣe interpolate láàrin Haldane ~2s nínú strong-selection limit (Ns≫1) àti neutral 1/(2N) nínú drift limit (Ns≪1 tàbí s=0).
yoruba.more_than_humans_20_000_many_novel_gen: Ju ènìyàn (~20,000). Ọ̀pọ̀ gene novel fún sensory perception + cognition.
yoruba.special_protein_dsup_wraps_dna_protect: Protein pàtàkì (Dsup) ń dì DNA ó sì ń dáàbò bò ó lọ́wọ́ ìbàjẹ́ X-ray. Ìwádìí fún radiotherapy application.
yoruba.hypersensitive_contact_inhibition_high: Hypersensitive contact inhibition + high-molecular-weight hyaluronan. Jẹjẹrẹ ṣọ̀wọ́n gan-an.
yoruba.elephants_have_20_copies_of_tumor_supp: Àwọn erin ní ẹ̀dà ~20 ti tumor suppressor TP53 (ènìyàn ní 1). Àlàyé tí ó ṣeéṣe fún ìwọ̀n jẹjẹrẹ kékeré láìka cell count ńlá sí.
yoruba.axolotl_can_regrow_limbs_spinal_cord_h: Axolotl lè tún hù ọwọ́-ẹsẹ̀, spinal cord, ọkàn, kódà àwọn apá ọpọlọ. Ìwádìí fún regenerative medicine.
yoruba.stores_fat_not_water_myth_allows_survi: Ń fi ọ̀rá pamọ́, kìí ṣe omi (àdàkàdekè). Ń jẹ́ kí ó yè fún ọ̀sẹ̀ púpọ̀ láìsí oúnjẹ. A ń rí omi láti mímu + metabolic byproduct.
yoruba.population_crashed_12_000_years_ago_ge: Population wó lulẹ̀ ~ọdún 12,000 sẹ́yìn. Genetic bottleneck → diversity kékeré gan-an. Cheetah kọ̀ọ̀kan jẹ́ genetically fẹ́rẹ̀ jẹ́ ìbejì.
yoruba.modern_whales_descended_from_land_mamm: Àwọn ẹja nlanla òde-òní wá láti ọ̀dọ̀ ẹranko-ọ̀mú ilẹ̀ (~ọdún mílíọ̀nù 50 sẹ́yìn). Ìbátan tí ó sún mọ́ jù tí ó wà láàyè — erinmi. Vestigial pelvic bone ṣì wà.
yoruba.wide_variation_adder_s_tongue_fern_720: Ìyàtọ̀ ńlá. Adder's-tongue fern — ìsopọ̀ ~720 (jù tí a kọsílẹ̀). Ìrẹsì — ìsopọ̀ 12. Ènìyàn — ìsopọ̀ 23.
yoruba.all_female_asexual_for_80_million_year: Gbogbo abo, asexual fún ~ọdún mílíọ̀nù 80. Wọ́n ń rí gene láti species mìíràn (HGT) dípò ìyàtọ̀ nípasẹ̀ sex.
yoruba.lobe_finned_fish_thought_extinct_since: Ẹja lobe-finned tí a rò pé ó parẹ́ láti ìgbà dinosaur. A rí àpẹẹrẹ tí ó wà láàyè ní 1938. Ìran ~ọdún mílíọ̀nù 400.
yoruba.blue_copper_based_hemocyanin_detects_b: Búlúù (copper-based hemocyanin). Ń detect bacterial endotoxin — a ń lò ó láti test vaccine + medical device.
yoruba.diverged_from_brown_bears_150_000_500_: Ya kúrò lọ́dọ̀ brown bear ~ọdún 150,000-500,000 sẹ́yìn. A ti jẹ́rìí sí àwọn grizzly-polar hybrid díẹ̀ ("pizzly" tàbí "grolar") nínú igbó.
yoruba.dog_breed_genetics_wild_dna_facts: 🐕 Genetics irú ajá + òtítọ́ DNA igbó
yoruba.hormones_travel_through_the_bloodstrea: Hormone ń rìn nípasẹ̀ ìṣàn ẹ̀jẹ̀ láti ṣiṣẹ́ ní target tissue tí ó jìnnà. Wọ́n ń ṣàkóso metabolism, ìdàgbàsókè, ìbísí, stress response, àti homeostasis.
yoruba.approximate_elemental_composition_of_t: Ìṣètò èròja tí ó sún mọ́ ti ara ènìyàn nípa mass. Èròja 11 nìkan ni ó jẹ́ >99%. CHNOPS (C, H, N, O, P, S) ń ṣe fẹ́rẹ̀ gbogbo organic molecule.
yoruba.recent_extinctions_mostly_human_caused: Àwọn ìparẹ́ àìpẹ́ (púpọ̀ jù ènìyàn ló fà) + àwọn ìparẹ́ ìtàn àtijọ́ olókìkí. Ilẹ̀-ayé ti ní mass extinction 5 — ọ̀pọ̀ ń sọ pé a wà ní ìkarùn-ún nísisìyí.
yoruba.6co_6h_o_light_c_h_o_6o_powered_by_chl: 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + ìmọ́lẹ̀ → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂. Chlorophyll ló ń darí rẹ̀. Orísun ọ̀pọ̀ oxygen afẹ́fẹ́.
yoruba.c3_most_plants_c4_corn_sugarcane_effic: C3 (ọ̀pọ̀ ọ̀gbìn), C4 (àgbàdo, ìrèké — dára ní T gíga), CAM (cactus, succulent — ń ṣí stomata ní alẹ́ láti fi omi pamọ́).
yoruba.tiny_pores_on_leaves_let_co_in_o_water: Àwọn ihò kékeré lórí ewé. Wọ́n ń jẹ́ kí CO₂ wọlé + O₂/omi jáde. Wọ́n ń ṣí/tì gẹ́gẹ́ bí ìmọ́lẹ̀, omi, CO₂.
yoruba.carries_water_minerals_up_from_roots_d: Ń gbé omi + mineral sókè láti gbòǹgbò. Sẹ́ẹ̀lì ti kú. Ń ṣẹ̀dá transpiration pull.
yoruba.carries_sugars_from_leaves_to_rest_of_: Ń gbé ṣúgà láti ewé sí ìyókù ọ̀gbìn. Sẹ́ẹ̀lì wà láàyè. Ọ̀nà méjì.
yoruba.plant_hormone_phototropism_growing_tow: Hormone ọ̀gbìn. Phototropism (dídàgbà sí ìmọ́lẹ̀). concentration ní ẹ̀gbẹ́ òjìji → sẹ́ẹ̀lì ń gùn → ń tẹ̀ sí ìmọ́lẹ̀.
yoruba.gas_hormone_ripens_fruit_why_ripe_bana: Hormone gaasi. Ń mú kí èso pọ́n. Ìdí tí ọ̀gẹ̀dẹ̀ tó pọ́n fi ń mú kí èso mìíràn pọ́n. Stress signaling.
yoruba.promotes_stem_elongation_seed_germinat: Ń gbé ìgùn èèpo, ìhù irúgbìn, ìtanná lárugẹ.
yoruba.promotes_cell_division_delays_leaf_sen: Ń gbé ìpín sẹ́ẹ̀lì lárugẹ. Ń dá ọjọ́-orí ewé dúró.
yoruba.stress_hormone_closes_stomata_when_wat: Hormone stress. Ń tì stomata nígbà tí omi bá dín. Ń gbé oorun irúgbìn lárugẹ.
yoruba.angiosperm_unique_one_sperm_fertilizes: Angiosperm ṣàrà ọ̀tọ̀ — sperm kan ń so egg cell (embryo) lóyún, èkejì ń so polar nuclei (endosperm — oúnjẹ fún irúgbìn) lóyún.
yoruba.flower_shape_color_scent_match_pollina: Ìrísí òdòdó, àwọ̀, òórùn ń bá ìfẹ́ pollinator mu. Àwọn kan specialized gan-an (orchid + kòkòrò pàtó).
yoruba.evolved_in_nutrient_poor_soils_venus_f: Wọ́n evolve nínú ilẹ̀ tí kò ní oúnjẹ. Venus flytrap (snap trap), pitcher plant (pitfall trap), sundew (tí ń lẹ̀).
yoruba.symbiosis_with_fungi_fungi_extend_root: Symbiosis pẹ̀lú elú. Elú ń gbòòrò ìdé gbòǹgbò; ọ̀gbìn ń fún ṣúgà. ~85% ti plant species.
yoruba.rhizobium_bacteria_in_root_nodules_con: Rhizobium bakitéríà nínú root nodule, ń yí N₂ → NH₃ padà. Ìdí nìyẹn tí ẹ̀wà + ọ̀tọ̀ fi ní protein púpọ̀ + ń mú ilẹ̀ sunwọ̀n.
yoruba.domestication_selected_larger_seeds_wh: Ìtọ́jú-ilé yan irúgbìn ńlá (ìrẹsì), tí kì í ru (àlìkámà), èso adùn (áfẹ́lì). Láìpẹ́ — hybrid corn, GMO, marker-assisted selection.
yoruba.common_in_plants_rare_in_animals_wheat: Wọ́pọ̀ nínú ọ̀gbìn (ṣọ̀wọ́n nínú ẹranko). Àlìkámà jẹ́ hexaploid (set 6), strawberry jẹ́ octoploid. Sábà ń mú vigor + yield pọ̀ sí i.
yoruba.stiffening_compound_in_cell_walls_of_w: Àkópọ̀ tí ń le nínú ògiri sẹ́ẹ̀lì ti igi. Ìdí nìyẹn tí igi fi le + ń jẹrà lọ́ra.
yoruba.individuals_of_one_species_in_an_area: Àwọn ẹnìkọ̀ọ̀kan ti species kan ní agbègbè.
yoruba.all_populations_interacting_in_an_area: Gbogbo population tí ń bára wọn ṣepọ̀ ní agbègbè.
yoruba.all_ecosystems_on_earth_the_zone_of_li: Gbogbo ecosystem lórí ilẹ̀-ayé. Agbègbè ìwàláàyè.
yoruba.role_of_a_species_in_its_ecosystem_two: Ipa species nínú ecosystem rẹ̀. species méjì kò lè gba niche kannáà (competitive exclusion).
yoruba.network_of_who_eats_whom_trophic_level: Nẹ́tíwọ́ọ̀kì ti ẹni tí ń jẹ ẹni. Trophic level — producer → primary consumer → secondary → àti bẹ́ẹ̀ bẹ́ẹ̀ lọ.
yoruba.make_own_food_plants_algae_some_bacter: Ń ṣe oúnjẹ ara wọn. Ọ̀gbìn, algae, bakitéríà kan. Ìpìlẹ̀ food chain.
yoruba.get_food_by_eating_others_herbivores_c: Ń rí oúnjẹ nípa jíjẹ àwọn mìíràn. Herbivore, carnivore, omnivore.
yoruba.break_down_dead_matter_fungi_bacteria_: Ń fọ́ ohun tí ó kú. Elú, bakitéríà, decomposer. Ń ṣe recycle oúnjẹ.
yoruba.close_interaction_between_species_mutu: Ìbáṣepọ̀ tímọ́tímọ́ láàrin species. Mutualism (+/+), commensalism (+/0), parasitism (+/−).
yoruba.disproportionate_effect_on_ecosystem_d: Ipa tí kò dọ́gba lórí ecosystem láìka iye kékeré sí. Otter òkun ń ṣàkóso sea urchin, tí ń ṣàkóso kelp.
yoruba.maximum_population_size_environment_ca: Population size tí ó pọ̀ jù tí àyíká lè gbé. Resource, predation, disease ń dín K kù.
yoruba.population_grows_at_constant_rate_dn_d: Population ń dàgbà ní ìwọ̀n tí kò yí padà. dN/dt = rN. Kò lè tẹ̀síwájú títí láé.
yoruba.growth_slows_as_n_approaches_k_dn_dt_r: Ìdàgbàsókè ń lọ́ra bí N ṣe ń sún mọ́ K. dN/dt = rN(K-N)/K. curve ìrísí S.
yoruba.many_offspring_little_parental_care_sh: Ọmọ púpọ̀, ìtọ́jú òbí díẹ̀, ìgbésí ayé kúkúrú. Kòkòrò, èpò. Boom-and-bust.
yoruba.few_offspring_lots_of_care_long_lived_: Ọmọ díẹ̀, ìtọ́jú púpọ̀, ìgbésí ayé gígùn. Ẹja nlanla, ènìyàn, igi oak.
yoruba.predictable_changes_in_community_over_: Àwọn ìyípadà tí a lè sọ àsọtẹ́lẹ̀ nínú àwùjọ ní àkókò. Primary (àpáta òfo) vs. secondary (lẹ́yìn ìdàrúdàpọ̀).
yoruba.variety_of_life_species_richness_count: Oríṣiríṣi ìwàláàyè. Species richness (iye) + evenness (pínpín). Biodiversity gíga → ecosystem resilience.
yoruba.background_rate_1_species_per_million_: Background rate ~species 1 fún mílíọ̀nù ọdún. Ìwọ̀n òde-òní jẹ́ 100-1000× ti background nítorí ènìyàn.
yoruba.major_life_zone_defined_by_climate_veg: Agbègbè ìwàláàyè pàtàkì tí ojú-ọjọ́ + ewéko ṣàlàyé. Tropical rainforest, aṣálẹ̀, tundra, savanna, àti bẹ́ẹ̀ bẹ́ẹ̀ lọ.
yoruba.n_nh_fixation_no_no_nitrification_orga: N₂ → NH₃ (fixation) → NO₂⁻ → NO₃⁻ (nitrification) → organic N → padà N₂ (denitrification).
yoruba.co_photosynthesis_organic_c_respiratio: CO₂ ↔ photosynthesis ↔ organic C ↔ respiration. Fossil fuel ń dá C tí a sin fún ìgbà pípẹ́ padà sí afẹ́fẹ́.
yoruba.evaporation_condensation_precipitation: Ìfẹ́ omi → ìkóra → òjò → ìṣàn/omi abẹ́lẹ̀ → padà sí òkun.
yoruba.movement_of_elements_c_n_p_s_through_b: Ìṣíkiri àwọn èròja (C, N, P, S) nípasẹ̀ biotic + abiotic compartment.
yoruba.each_chosen_for_properties_that_make_b: A yan ọ̀kọ̀ọ̀kan fún àwọn ohun-ìní tí ń mú kí biology ṣeéṣe láti ṣàkóso — ìwọ̀n, fast life cycle, ìrọ̀rùn dídàgbà, genetic tool.
yoruba.heat_separates_double_stranded_dna_int: Ooru ń ya double-stranded DNA sọ́tọ̀ sí single strand. Hydrogen bond ń fọ́.
yoruba.primers_short_dna_sequences_bind_to_co: Primer (short DNA sequence) ń so mọ́ agbègbè ìbámu ti template strand kọ̀ọ̀kan.
yoruba.dna_polymerase_taq_from_thermus_aquati: DNA polymerase (Taq — láti Thermus aquaticus) ń extend primer ó sì ń ṣe synthesize DNA tuntun.
yoruba.each_cycle_doubles_target_dna_30_cycle: Ìyípo kọ̀ọ̀kan ń ṣe target DNA ní ìlọ́po méjì. ìyípo 30 → ~10⁹-fold amplification.
yoruba.kary_mullis_invented_pcr_1983_won_nobe: Kary Mullis ṣẹ̀dá PCR (1983); gba Nobel ní 1993.
yoruba.from_thermophilic_bacterium_in_hot_spr: Láti thermophilic bacterium nínú ìsun omi gbígbóná. Ń yè lọ́wọ́ denaturation step ti 95 °C.
yoruba.fluorescent_dyes_report_on_amplificati: Fluorescent dye ń ròyìn amplification ní real-time. A ń lò ó fún COVID test, gene expression.
yoruba.reverse_transcription_pcr_converts_rna: Reverse transcription PCR. Ń yí RNA padà sí cDNA lákọ̀ọ́kọ́. A ń lò ó fún RNA virus (COVID, HIV, ako-inira).
yoruba.partitions_sample_into_thousands_of_dr: Ń pín sample sí ẹgbẹẹgbẹ̀rún droplet. Ń ka wíwà/àìsí — quantification pípé gan-an.
yoruba.diagnostics_forensics_gene_cloning_anc: Diagnostics, forensics, gene cloning, ancient DNA (bíi Jurassic Park; ní tòótọ́ sábà <mílíọ̀nù ọdún 1).
yoruba.first_crispr_therapy_fda_approved_dec_: CRISPR therapy àkọ́kọ́ FDA-approved (Disẹ́mbà 2023). Ń ṣàtúnṣe patient stem cell ex vivo.
yoruba.crispr_engineers_t_cells_to_attack_can: CRISPR ń ṣe ẹ̀rọ T cell láti kọlù cancer. Ọ̀pọ̀ Phase I/II trial.
yoruba.crispr_knockout_libraries_reveal_which: CRISPR knockout library ń ṣàfihàn gene wo ni essential fún àrùn.
yoruba.faster_than_traditional_knockout_mice_: Yára ju knockout mouse ìbílẹ̀. A ń lò ó gbòòrò nínú ìwádìí.
yoruba.disease_resistant_rice_mushrooms_that_: Ìrẹsì tí ó tako àrùn, olú tí kì í di aláwọ̀ búráwùn, àlìkámà gluten-free (ọ̀pọ̀ ṣì wà nínú ìwádìí).
yoruba.spread_sterility_or_malaria_resistance: Ń tan àìlọ́mọ tàbí malaria resistance nípasẹ̀ wild population. Field trial ṣì wà nínú àríyànjiyàn.
yoruba.he_jiankui_2018_edited_human_embryos_m: He Jiankui (2018) ṣàtúnṣe human embryo → ìbínú moral + scientific. Nísisìyí a ti fòfin dè é ní ọ̀pọ̀ orílẹ̀-èdè.
yoruba.human_body_has_10_human_cells_10_10_mi: Ara ènìyàn ní ~10¹³ human cell + ~10¹³-10¹⁴ microbial cell. Fẹ́rẹ̀ dọ́gba ní iye.
yoruba.500_1_000_bacterial_species_in_healthy: bacterial species 500-1,000+ nínú ìfun àgbàlagbà tí ó ní ìlera. Pẹ̀lú archaea, elú, virus.
yoruba.microbiome_carries_100_more_genes_than: Microbiome ń gbé gene ~100× ju human genome. Ń fi ọ̀pọ̀ agbára metabolic kún.
yoruba.gut_microbes_communicate_with_brain_vi: Gut microbe ń bá ọpọlọ sọ̀rọ̀ nípasẹ̀ vagus nerve, immune signal, metabolite. A so mọ́ mood, ìhùwàsí — ṣùgbọ́n ọ̀pọ̀ àwọn ìdábọ̀ pàtó ni a gbé ga jù.
yoruba.broad_spectrum_antibiotics_wipe_out_co: Broad-spectrum antibiotic ń pa commensal rẹ́ → ìmúláradá lè gba oṣù/ọdún. Àwọn shift kan ń dúró.
yoruba.fecal_microbiota_transplant_fmt_cures_: Fecal microbiota transplant (FMT) ń wo recurrent C. difficile infection sàn ní ~90% ti àwọn ọ̀ràn. Àwọn ìlò mìíràn ṣì jẹ́ experimental.
yoruba.varies_by_body_site_forehead_oily_domi: Ń yàtọ̀ nípa body site — iwájú orí (òróró, Cutibacterium acnes ń jọba), ìfun (anaerobe), abẹ́ àpá (òógùn apocrine + bakitéríà → òórùn ara).
yoruba.healthy_lactobacillus_dominant_low_ph_: Ìlera — Lactobacillus ń jọba, pH kékeré. Àìdọ́gba → bacterial vaginosis (BV).
yoruba.700_species_affects_cavities_gum_disea: ~species 700. Ń nípa lórí ìbàjẹ́ eyín, àrùn gọ́ọ̀mù. A so mọ́ cardiovascular risk.
yoruba.vaginal_birth_seeds_infant_with_matern: Ìbímọ nípasẹ̀ ojú-ọmọ ń fún ọmọ ní maternal vaginal microbe; C-section ń fún ní skin microbe. A ń kẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ipa ìgbà pípẹ́ (àwọn kan wà nínú àríyànjiyàn).
yoruba.contains_live_bacteria_prebiotics_hmos: Ó ní live bacteria + prebiotic (HMO) tí ń bọ́ gut microbe pàtó (B. infantis).
yoruba.sperm_egg_fuse_diploid_zygote_forms: Sperm + egg ń dàpọ̀. Diploid zygote ń ṣẹ̀dá.
yoruba.rapid_cell_divisions_without_growth_2_: Ìpín sẹ́ẹ̀lì kíákíá láìsí ìdàgbàsókè. Stage 2 → 4 → 8 → 16 cell.
yoruba.hollow_ball_with_inner_cell_mass_futur: Bọ́ọ̀lù ṣófo pẹ̀lú inner cell mass (embryo ọjọ́ iwájú) + trophoblast (placenta ọjọ́ iwájú).
yoruba.blastocyst_attaches_to_uterine_wall: Blastocyst ń so mọ́ ògiri ilé-ọmọ.
yoruba.cell_movements_form_3_germ_layers_ecto: Ìṣíkiri sẹ́ẹ̀lì ń ṣe germ layer 3 — ectoderm, mesoderm, endoderm.
yoruba.neural_tube_forms_from_ectoderm_future: Neural tube ń ṣẹ̀dá láti ectoderm. Ọpọlọ ọjọ́ iwájú + spinal cord.
yoruba.all_major_organs_begin_forming_heart_s: Gbogbo àwọn ẹ̀yà ara pàtàkì ń bẹ̀rẹ̀ sí ṣẹ̀dá. Ọkàn ń bẹ̀rẹ̀ sí lu ~ọ̀sẹ̀ 4-5.
yoruba.growth_maturation_major_structures_alr: Ìdàgbàsókè + ìdàgbà. Àwọn ìtòlẹ́sẹẹsẹ pàtàkì ti ṣẹ̀dá tẹ́lẹ̀.
yoruba.cancer_cells_produce_their_own_growth_: Cancer cell ń ṣe agbo growth signal ara wọn láti activate receptor ní constitutively.
yoruba.tumor_suppressors_p53_rb_inactivated_c: Tumor suppressor (p53, Rb) kò ṣiṣẹ́ → sẹ́ẹ̀lì ń pín láìka stop signal sí.
yoruba.apoptosis_pathways_disabled_damaged_ce: Apoptosis pathway kò ṣiṣẹ́. sẹ́ẹ̀lì tí ó bàjẹ́ ń wà láàyè nígbà tí ó yẹ kí ó kú.
yoruba.reactivate_telomerase_telomeres_mainta: Reactivate telomerase → a ń tọ́jú telomere → ìpín láìlópin.
yoruba.tumors_recruit_blood_vessels_to_feed_g: Tumor ń gba ohun èlò ẹ̀jẹ̀ láti bọ́ mass tí ń dàgbà.
yoruba.cells_lose_adhesion_migrate_colonize_d: sẹ́ẹ̀lì ń pàdánù adhesion, ń ṣíkiri, ń gba tissue tí ó jìnnà.
yoruba.warburg_effect_tumors_use_glycolysis_e: Warburg effect — tumor ń lo glycolysis kódà pẹ̀lú oxygen.
yoruba.tumors_hide_from_or_suppress_immune_su: Tumor ń fi ara pamọ́ kúrò ní tàbí ń dí immune surveillance lọ́wọ́ (PD-L1 expression).
yoruba.chronic_inflammation_creates_a_permiss: Ìgbóná onígbà pípẹ́ ń ṣẹ̀dá àyíká tí ó gbà láàyè.
yoruba.accumulating_mutations_chromosomal_rea: mutation tí ń kójọ + chromosomal rearrangement ń darí evolution.
yoruba.fast_non_specific_skin_mucus_complemen: Yára, non-specific. Awọ̀ ara, mucus, complement, neutrophil, NK cell, macrophage.
yoruba.slower_days_highly_specific_has_memory: Lọ́ra (ní ọjọ́), specific gan-an, ní memory. B cell (antibody) + T cell.
yoruba.produce_antibodies_each_b_cell_makes_o: Ń ṣe antibody. B cell kọ̀ọ̀kan ń ṣe specificity kan. B cell tí ó ṣiṣẹ́ ń di plasma cell.
yoruba.coordinate_immune_response_hiv_target_: Ń ṣàkóso immune response. target ti HIV. A ń darí wọn láti naive sí specialized subset (Th1, Th2, Th17, Treg).
yoruba.kill_infected_or_cancerous_cells_via_p: Ń pa sẹ́ẹ̀lì tí ó ní àkóràn tàbí ti cancer nípasẹ̀ perforin + granzyme.
yoruba.y_shaped_proteins_5_classes_igg_most_a: Protein ìrísí Y. class 5 — IgG (jù), IgA (mucosa), IgM (ìbẹ̀rẹ̀), IgE (aleji + parasite), IgD (B-cell surface).
yoruba.cell_surface_molecules_that_present_an: cell surface molecule tí ń fi antigen hàn fún T cell. MHC I (gbogbo cell, viral peptide). MHC II (immune cell, extracellular peptide).
yoruba.plasma_proteins_that_punch_holes_in_pa: plasma protein tí ń gbẹ́ ihò nínú pathogen + ń gba phagocyte.
yoruba.signaling_molecules_of_immune_system_i: signaling molecule ti immune system. Interferon (antiviral), interleukin (ìṣàkóso), TNF (ìgbóná).
yoruba.long_lived_b_t_cells_from_prior_exposu: B + T cell tí ń pẹ́ láti ìfihàn tẹ́lẹ̀. Ìpìlẹ̀ vaccine + àjẹsára ìgbésí ayé gbogbo.
yoruba.train_adaptive_immunity_without_diseas: Ń kọ́ adaptive immunity láìsí àrùn. mRNA (COVID), protein subunit, live attenuated, inactivated.
yoruba.immune_system_attacks_self_type_1_diab: Immune system ń kọlù ara rẹ̀. Type 1 diabetes, RA, MS, lupus, Hashimoto.
yoruba.ige_mediated_hypersensitivity_mast_cel: IgE-mediated hypersensitivity. Mast cell ń tú histamine sílẹ̀.
yoruba.dendrites_receive_soma_cell_body_axon_: Dendrite (gbà), soma (cell body), axon (ń ránṣẹ́), terminal (ń tú neurotransmitter sílẹ̀).
yoruba.all_or_none_electrical_signal_sodium_i: All-or-none electrical signal. Sodium wọlé → depolarize → potassium jáde → repolarize. ~1 ms. Speed — ~1 m/s (unmyelinated) sí ~100 m/s (myelinated).
yoruba.fatty_insulation_made_by_glia_oligoden: Insulation ọ̀rá tí glia (oligodendrocyte nínú CNS, Schwann cell nínú PNS) ṣe. Ń mú conduction yára. Ń bàjẹ́ nínú MS.
yoruba.junction_between_neurons_electrical_or: junction láàrin neuron. Electrical tàbí chemical (sábà). Gap ~0.02 µm.
yoruba.chemical_messengers_across_synapse_exc: chemical messenger káàkiri synapse. Excitatory (glutamate), inhibitory (GABA), modulatory (serotonin, dopamine).
yoruba.reward_motivation_motor_control_low_in: Reward, motivation, motor control. Kékeré nínú Parkinson; dysregulated nínú schizophrenia.
yoruba.mood_sleep_appetite_ssris_target_reupt: Mood, oorun, ìfẹ́ oúnjẹ. SSRI ń fojúsùn reuptake.
yoruba.neuromuscular_junction_memory_attentio: Neuromuscular junction. Memory + attention. Kékeré nínú Alzheimer.
yoruba.astrocytes_support_bbb_oligodendrocyte: Astrocyte (support, BBB), oligodendrocyte (myelin nínú CNS), microglia (immune), ependymal cell (cerebrospinal fluid).
yoruba.cerebrum_cortex_thinking_perception_ce: Cerebrum (cortex — ìrònú, perception), cerebellum (motor coordination), brainstem (autonomic), limbic system (ìmọ̀lára + memory).
yoruba.brain_reorganizes_itself_strongest_in_: Ọpọlọ ń tún ara rẹ̀ ṣe — lágbára jù nígbà èwe, ṣùgbọ́n ń tẹ̀síwájú ní ìgbésí ayé gbogbo. Ìpìlẹ̀ learning.
yoruba.tight_junctions_between_brain_capillar: tight junction láàrin brain capillary cell ń pa ọ̀pọ̀ molecule mọ́ níta. Ìpèníjà ńlá fún drug delivery sí CNS.
yoruba.20_of_body_s_energy_at_rest_despite_be: ~20% ti agbára ara nígbà ìsinmi (láìka jíjẹ́ ~2% ti mass). Ọ̀pọ̀ fún Na+/K+ pump tí ń tọ́jú ion gradient.
yoruba.first_mass_produced_human_protein_made: Protein ènìyàn àkọ́kọ́ tí a ṣe ní ọ̀pọ̀. A ṣe é ní E. coli (1982). Rọ́pò insulin ẹlẹ́dẹ̀ + màlúù.
yoruba.single_target_therapies_humira_autoimm: Single-target therapy. Humira (autoimmune), Herceptin (HER2+ breast cancer), Keytruda (immunotherapy).
yoruba.covid_19_vaccines_pfizer_moderna_self_: COVID-19 vaccine (Pfizer, Moderna). Self-amplifying version + non-COVID application nínú ìdàgbàsókè.
yoruba.replace_defective_genes_luxturna_inher: Ń rọ́pò gene tí ó ní àbùkù. Luxturna (ìfọ́jú àjogúnbá, FDA 2017). Zolgensma (SMA, 2019).
yoruba.engineered_immune_cells_yescarta_kymri: immune cell tí a ṣe ẹ̀rọ. Yescarta + Kymriah fún blood cancer. ~$400,000 fún dose.
yoruba.bone_marrow_transplants_standard_for_d: Bone marrow transplant jẹ́ ọ̀pá-ìdiwọ̀n fún ọdún. newer iPSC + ESC approach nínú ìwádìí.
yoruba.print_tissue_with_living_cells_scaffol: Print tissue pẹ̀lú living cell + scaffold. Awọ̀ ara, cartilage, kíndìnrín. Ẹ̀yà ara pípé ṣì jìnnà.
yoruba.engineer_biological_systems_bacteria_t: Ṣe ẹ̀rọ biological system. Bakitéríà tí ń ṣe oògùn, yeast tí ń ṣe opioid, algal biofuel.
yoruba.bt_corn_insect_resistance_roundup_read: Bt corn (insect resistance), Roundup Ready (herbicide), Golden Rice (vitamin A).
yoruba.str_profiling_mtdna_degraded_samples_y: STR profiling, mtDNA (sample tí ó bàjẹ́), Y chromosome (ìlà baba). Ìfiwéra database.
yoruba.snp_arrays_23andme_ancestrydna_reveals: SNP array (23andMe, AncestryDNA). Ń ṣàfihàn biogeographic ancestry + ìbátan DNA.
yoruba.detect_cancer_dna_in_blood_earlier_dia: Detect cancer DNA nínú ẹ̀jẹ̀. Àyẹ̀wò kùtùkùtù, treatment monitoring.
yoruba.treat_solid_tumors_til_therapy_iovance: Tọ́jú solid tumor. TIL therapy (Iovance, melanoma) FDA-approved ní 2024.
yoruba.engineered_microbes_clean_up_oil_spill: Microbe tí a ṣe ẹ̀rọ ń sọ ìdàjẹ́ epo, ìdọ̀tí ike, irin tí ó wúwo di mímọ́.
yoruba.amplifies_specific_dna_sequences_a_bil: Ń ṣe àmúpọ̀ DNA sequence pàtó ní ìlọ́po bílíọ̀nù. workhorse ti molecular biology, diagnostics, forensics.
yoruba.the_3_steps_repeated_30: Ìgbésẹ̀ 3 wọ̀nyí (~30× tí a tún ṣe)
yoruba.originally_a_bacterial_immune_system_n: Ní ìpilẹ̀ṣẹ̀ bacterial immune system, nísisìyí programmable gene-editing tool. Doudna + Charpentier pín Nobel 2020.
yoruba.viruses_are_non_living_infectious_agen: Virus jẹ́ non-living infectious agent — wọ́n nílò host cell láti pọ̀ sí i. A ń pín wọn nípa genome type (Baltimore classification), envelope, ìrísí.
yoruba.microbiome_science_is_advancing_fast_m: Microbiome science ń tẹ̀síwájú kíákíá. Ọ̀pọ̀ àwọn ìdábọ̀ olókìkí (probiotic strain pàtó tí ń "wo" ipò pàtó sàn) wà ṣáájú ẹ̀rí. Rọ̀ mọ́ àwọn àbájáde tí a tún ṣe gbọ̀ngbọ̀n.
yoruba.germ_layers_what_each_forms: Germ layer — ohun tí ọ̀kọ̀ọ̀kan ń ṣe
yoruba.defined_by_hanahan_weinberg_2000_updat: Hanahan + Weinberg (2000, ìmúdójúìwọ̀n 2011) ṣàlàyé. Ọ̀pọ̀ cancer ń gba ọ̀pọ̀ àmì. Therapy ń fojúsùn àwọn àmì pàtó jù.
